WIC
By Your Side, Pregnancy to 5
From the moment you find out you're expecting until your child turns 5, WIC provides extra support to help keep you and your family healthy.
Call:
(760) 924-4610
or
Text:
1-800-421-9627
to Apply
*Federal Government Shutdown Update*
California WIC is
open
during the federal government shutdown.
WIC offices are open during the federal government shutdown. WIC continues to serve and enroll families. Families should continue to use their WIC benefits and attend their WIC appointments.
Visit
WIC’s webpage
on the federal budget for updates and information.
About WIC
What is WIC?
WIC provides
free healthy foods
, breastfeeding support, nutrition education and referrals to services to support you and your family.
Who Can Apply?
If you are pregnant, recently had a baby, care for a child under age 5, or have experienced a recent pregnancy loss, you may qualify for WIC.
Am I eligible?
You may qualify if you have
low-to-medium income
, receive Medi-Cal, CalWORKs, or CalFresh.
How to Apply
Call:
(760) 924-4610
Text:
1-800-421-9627
Appointments are available by video, phone, and in-person. Learn more about
what to expect
.
Hours
8am – 4pm Mon–Fri
Bonus hours by phone: 4–6pm Mon & Wed
Locations
Mammoth Lakes Civic Center, 1290 Tavern Rd, 2nd Floor. In-person services available at additional locations. Call to schedule.
